title: Vertical Motions
intro: Move through a file fast: `gg` jumps to the first line, `G` to the last line. `{` and `}` jump between paragraphs (blank lines).

exercises.instruction: Jump to the first line with `gg`.
Jump to the last line with `G`.
Jump forward to the blank line between the functions with `}`.
hints: `}` jumps to the next blank line (paragraph boundary).

exercises.instruction: Now from the bottom, jump back to that blank line with `{`.
hints: `{` jumps to the previous blank line.

exercises.instruction: Hop forward two paragraphs: press `}` twice to land on the second blank line.
exercises.initialCode:
intro line
second line

middle starts
middle ends

final line
hints: Each `}` jumps to the next blank line.

exercises.instruction: From the bottom: jump to the top with `gg`, then down one paragraph with `}`.
exercises.initialCode:
intro line
second line

middle starts
middle ends

final line
hints: `gg` first, then a single `}` lands on the first blank line.

exercises.instruction: You're inside the middle paragraph. Jump to the last line with `G`, then back up one paragraph with `{`.
exercises.initialCode:
intro line
second line

middle starts
middle ends

final line
hints: `G` to the bottom, then `{` back to the blank line above it.
